title: Discipline Support Officer
description:
Job Description:

  • Assist in preliminary investigations, fact-finding interviews, and collection of student/witness statements
  • Compile evidence and prepare structured incident reports for key personnel
  • Supervise recess, lunchtime, and detention sessions (Monday–Thursday)
  • Maintain accurate attendance and behavioral records during detention
  • Coordinate and facilitate restorative reflection and restitution activities
  • Guide students in understanding choices, consequences, and improvement strategies
  • Support in-house suspension programmes by providing structure and learning continuity
  • Assist suspended students with reflection and re-entry support
  • Support lower secondary dismissal routines and high-movement areas
  • Maintain a visible adult presence through systematic campus patrols
  • Support proactive discipline and basic peer mediation where appropriate

Qualification:

  • Minimum 10 years’ experience in a uniformed service background (e.g. Police, Prison Service, or equivalent), with exposure to youth-related investigations and restorative or behavioral support work
  • Strong conflict management and de-escalation skills, with the ability to intervene calmly and proportionately
  • Sound judgement, discretion, and professionalism in managing sensitive situations
  • Clear communication skills with the ability to document incidents accurately
  • Firm yet respectful approach when working with students, balancing rapport with accountability
  • Sensitivity to diverse cultural backgrounds and school environments
  • Collaborative team player who works effectively with teachers and student management staff
  • Strong alignment with care-based and restorative discipline practices
  • Belief in student growth, development, and positive behavior change
  • High standards of professional ethics, confidentiality, empathy, and reliability

postedCompany.description:
Dynamic Safety Pte Ltd is a Singapore-based QEHS consulting firm established by a team of experienced professionals committed to delivering comprehensive Environment, Workplace Safety & Health, and Quality solutions to organisations across various sectors.

Alongside our strong capabilities in QHSE Management System Auditing, Consulting, Outsourcing and Training, we also provide a wide range of manpower support services to meet the operational needs of industries in Singapore.

Our manpower services cover the deployment of qualified and experienced personnel, including:

  • WSH Officers, WSH Coordinators, ECOs, Safety Supervisors, Fire Safety personnel

  • Technical staff, Operations support staff

  • Receptionists, Administrative Executives, Customer Service personnel

  • Teachers, Student Care staff, Early Childhood assistants

  • Lab Assistants, Science/Technical support staff

  • Logistics, Warehouse, Production, and Field Support manpower

  • Other specialised manpower based on project requirements

With a team that brings together global expertise and strong local industry experience, Dynamic Safety Pte Ltd ensures clients receive reliable, cost-effective, and practical solutions that support compliance, enhance productivity, and promote workplace excellence.

We remain dedicated to delivering high-quality consulting services and dependable manpower support, helping organisations operate safely, efficiently, and successfully in today’s challenging business environment.
postedCompany.name: DYNAMIC SAFETY PTE. LTD.
